requirement_topic.en: SONABEL Grid-Connection Standards — Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116), IEC 61727, and 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: SONABEL并网标准——防孤岛（IEC 62116）、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: SONABEL併網標準——防孤島（IEC 62116）、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V參數

summary.en: SONABEL (Société Nationale d'Électricité du Burkina) governs grid connection of solar PV inverters on Burkina Faso's national electricity network. Burkina Faso's grid operates at 50 Hz, single-phase 220 V, three-phase 380 V — consistent with West African ECOWAS/CEDEAO regional grid standards and with IEC 60038 standard voltages. ARSE (Autorité de Régulation du Secteur de l'Énergie) is the sector regulator whose authorisation is required before grid-tied generation equipment may be connected. ABNORM (Agence Burkinabè de Normalisation, de la Métrologie et de la Qualité) adopts IEC standards as the national reference. The applicable IEC grid-connection standards for PV inverters include: (1) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test — inverters must detect loss of mains and disconnect within 2 seconds maximum; (2) IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface, setting voltage and frequency disconnection thresholds; (3) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission limits. Inverter firmware and protection relay settings must be validated against Burkina Faso's 220/380 V, 50 Hz grid parameters. Although Burkina Faso's grid voltage is nominally the same as China's (220/380 V at 50 Hz under GB/T 156), SONABEL's own project specifications and donor/lender procurement rules reference IEC-based test evidence rather than Chinese GB/T documentation.
summary.zh: SONABEL（布基纳法索国家电力公司）负责管理布基纳法索国家电网的太阳能光伏逆变器并网。布基纳法索电网运行参数为50 Hz、单相220 V、三相380 V，与西非ECOWAS/CEDEAO地区电网标准及IEC 60038标准电压一致。ARSE（能源行业监管局）为行业监管机构，并网发电设备接入电网前须取得其授权。ABNORM（布基纳法索标准化、计量与质量局）采纳IEC标准作为国家参考。光伏逆变器适用的IEC并网标准包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤岛测试——逆变器须在最长2秒内检测电网失电并断开；（2）IEC 61727——光伏（PV）系统——电网接口特性，设定电压和频率断开阈值；（3）IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放限值。逆变器固件和保护继电器整定须针对布基纳法索220/380 V、50 Hz电网参数进行验证。尽管布基纳法索电网电压名义上与中国相同（依据GB/T 156为220/380 V、50 Hz），但SONABEL的项目规格及捐助方/贷款方采购规则均引用基于IEC的测试证据，而非中国GB/T文件。
summary.zht: SONABEL（布吉納法索國家電力公司）負責管理布吉納法索國家電網的太陽能光伏逆變器併網。布吉納法索電網運行參數為50 Hz、單相220 V、三相380 V，與西非ECOWAS/CEDEAO地區電網標準及IEC 60038標準電壓一致。ARSE（能源行業監管局）為行業監管機構，併網發電設備接入電網前須取得其授權。ABNORM（布吉納法索標準化、計量與質量局）採納IEC標準作為國家參考。光伏逆變器適用的IEC併網標準包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤島測試——逆變器須在最長2秒內偵測電網失電並斷開；（2）IEC 61727——光伏（PV）系統——電網介面特性，設定電壓和頻率斷開閾值；（3）IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放限值。逆變器韌體和保護繼電器整定須針對布吉納法索220/380 V、50 Hz電網參數進行驗證。儘管布吉納法索電網電壓名義上與中國相同（依據GB/T 156為220/380 V、50 Hz），但SONABEL的項目規格及捐助方/貸款方採購規則均引用基於IEC的測試證據，而非中國GB/T文件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions
IEC 60038 — IEC standard voltages (reference for 220/380 V, 50 Hz West African grid)
ARSE — Autorité de Régulation du Secteur de l'Énergie (Burkina Faso energy sector regulator — licensing authority for grid-tied generation)
SONABEL — Société Nationale d'Électricité du Burkina (national utility, grid-connection technical authority)

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System, applicable to utility-scale PV via 10 kV and above), NB/T 32004 (inverter technical specifications), and domestic anti-islanding test results. While Burkina Faso and China nominally share the same grid voltage (220/380 V at 50 Hz), SONABEL project specifications and donor/lender procurement rules (World Bank, AFD, AfDB) require IEC-referenced type-test evidence rather than Chinese GB/T documentation. Chinese grid-connection documents do not satisfy SONABEL's IEC-based technical review or ARSE licensing requirements for imported PV equipment.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，适用于通过10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏电站）、NB/T 32004（逆变器技术规范）及国内防孤岛测试结果。尽管布基纳法索和中国名义上共用相同的电网电压（220/380 V、50 Hz），但SONABEL项目规格及捐助方/贷款方采购规则（世界银行、法开署、非开行）要求IEC参考型式试验证据，而非中国GB/T文件。中国并网文件不满足SONABEL基于IEC的技术审查或进口光伏设备ARSE许可要求。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，適用於通過10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏電站）、NB/T 32004（逆變器技術規範）及國內防孤島測試結果。儘管布吉納法索和中國名義上共用相同的電網電壓（220/380 V、50 Hz），但SONABEL項目規格及捐助方/貸款方採購規則（世界銀行、法開署、非開行）要求IEC參考型式試驗證據，而非中國GB/T文件。中國併網文件不滿足SONABEL基於IEC的技術審查或進口光伏設備ARSE許可要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Although grid voltage parameters are nominally identical (220/380 V, 50 Hz), Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents are not accepted by SONABEL or ARSE as evidence for grid-tied PV inverter approval in Burkina Faso. Exporters must prepare: (a) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (b) IEC 61727 utility-interface compliance evidence; (c) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic emission compliance evidence; (d) ARSE authorisation as part of project permitting — confirm current licensing pathway and documentation requirements with ARSE directly; (e) SONABEL grid-connection application with IEC-compliant technical documentation. Where the project is donor/lender financed (World Bank, AFD, AfDB, EU), the procurement specification will typically mandate IEC type-test evidence independently of local regulatory requirements.
gap.zh: 差距：尽管电网电压参数名义上相同（220/380 V、50 Hz），中国GB/T并网文件不被SONABEL或ARSE接受作为布基纳法索并网光伏逆变器审批证据。出口商须准备：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62116防孤岛测试报告；（b）IEC 61727电网接口合规证据；（c）IEC 61000-3-2谐波排放合规证据；（d）ARSE授权——作为项目审批程序的一部分，须直接向ARSE确认当前许可途径和文件要求；（e）附IEC合规技术文件的SONABEL并网申请。若项目由捐助方/贷款方（世界银行、法开署、非开行、欧盟）资助，采购规格通常会独立于当地法规要求，强制规定IEC型式试验证据。
gap.zht: 差距：儘管電網電壓參數名義上相同（220/380 V、50 Hz），中國GB/T併網文件不被SONABEL或ARSE接受作為布吉納法索併網光伏逆變器審批證據。出口商須準備：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62116防孤島測試報告；（b）IEC 61727電網介面合規證據；（c）IEC 61000-3-2諧波排放合規證據；（d）ARSE授權——作為項目審批程序的一部分，須直接向ARSE確認當前許可途徑和文件要求；（e）附IEC合規技術文件的SONABEL併網申請。若項目由捐助方/貸款方（世界銀行、法開署、非開行、歐盟）資助，採購規格通常會獨立於當地法規要求，強制規定IEC型式試驗證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid connection under SONABEL technical requirements and ARSE licensing; donor/lender-financed projects impose IEC type-test requirements as a procurement condition independent of local regulatory requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's grid operator requirements but is not recognised as equivalent by SONABEL, ARSE, or donor/lender procurement specifications in Burkina Faso

source.publisher: ARSE — Autorité de Régulation du Secteur de l'Énergie (Burkina Faso)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Despite sharing nominal grid voltage (220/380 V, 50 Hz) with China, Burkina Faso's SONABEL and ARSE require IEC-based technical evidence for grid-tied PV inverters — Chinese GB/T grid certificates are not accepted as equivalent. Obtain IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface, and IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic emission test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory before submitting to SONABEL and ARSE. For donor/lender-financed projects, confirm procurement standard requirements with the project owner before finalising the equipment compliance package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尽管与中国共用名义电网电压（220/380 V、50 Hz），布基纳法索SONABEL和ARSE要求并网光伏逆变器提供基于IEC的技术证据——中国GB/T并网证书不被视为等效。在向SONABEL和ARSE提交前，须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727电网接口及IEC 61000-3-2谐波排放测试报告。对于捐助方/贷款方资助项目，在最终确定设备合规包前，请向项目业主确认采购标准要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 儘管與中國共用名義電網電壓（220/380 V、50 Hz），布吉納法索SONABEL和ARSE要求併網光伏逆變器提供基於IEC的技術證據——中國GB/T併網證書不被視為等效。在向SONABEL和ARSE提交前，須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727電網介面及IEC 61000-3-2諧波排放測試報告。對於捐助方/貸款方資助項目，在最終確定設備合規包前，請向項目業主確認採購標準要求。

requirement_topic.en: Off-Grid and Mini-Grid PV Inverters — ABER / FDE and IEC TS 62257 Series
requirement_topic.zh: 离网及微电网光伏逆变器——ABER/FDE及IEC TS 62257系列
requirement_topic.zht: 離網及微電網光伏逆變器——ABER/FDE及IEC TS 62257系列

summary.en: A significant portion of Burkina Faso's solar PV deployment is in off-grid and mini-grid systems serving rural communities with low electrification rates. The Agence Burkinabè de l'Electrification Rurale (ABER, formerly FDE — Fonds de Développement de l'Énergie) manages rural electrification programmes and applies IEC TS 62257 series specifications for stand-alone and mini-grid PV systems. Key applicable standards include: IEC TS 62257-1 (recommendations for rural electrification), IEC TS 62257-7-1 (PV array specifications), IEC TS 62257-8-1 (selection of electrical appliances), and IEC TS 62257-9-5 (integrated photovoltaic systems — particular specifications for SHS). Donor-financed mini-grid and SHS projects (World Bank, EU WACA, AFD, AfDB) routinely require IEC TS 62257-series compliance as a procurement condition. ARSE licensing applies to mini-grid operators. ABNORM serves as the national standards reference body adopting IEC standards.
summary.zh: 布基纳法索大量太阳能光伏部署集中在为低电气化率农村社区服务的离网及微电网系统。布基纳法索农村电气化局（ABER，前身为FDE——能源发展基金）管理农村电气化项目，并对独立及微电网光伏系统采用IEC TS 62257系列规格。主要适用标准包括：IEC TS 62257-1（农村电气化建议）、IEC TS 62257-7-1（光伏阵列规格）、IEC TS 62257-8-1（电气设备选择）及IEC TS 62257-9-5（集成光伏系统——太阳能家用系统特殊规格）。捐助方资助的微电网和SHS项目（世界银行、欧盟WACA、法开署、非开行）通常将IEC TS 62257系列合规作为采购条件。ARSE许可适用于微电网运营商。ABNORM作为采纳IEC标准的国家标准参考机构。
summary.zht: 布吉納法索大量太陽能光伏部署集中在為低電氣化率農村社區服務的離網及微電網系統。布吉納法索農村電氣化局（ABER，前身為FDE——能源發展基金）管理農村電氣化項目，並對獨立及微電網光伏系統採用IEC TS 62257系列規格。主要適用標準包括：IEC TS 62257-1（農村電氣化建議）、IEC TS 62257-7-1（光伏陣列規格）、IEC TS 62257-8-1（電氣設備選擇）及IEC TS 62257-9-5（集成光伏系統——太陽能家用系統特殊規格）。捐助方資助的微電網和SHS項目（世界銀行、歐盟WACA、法開署、非開行）通常將IEC TS 62257系列合規作為採購條件。ARSE許可適用於微電網運營商。ABNORM作為採納IEC標準的國家標準參考機構。

standards_or_laws: IEC TS 62257-1 — Recommendations for small renewable energy and hybrid systems for rural electrification — Part 1: General introduction
IEC TS 62257-7-1 — Recommendations for small renewable energy and hybrid systems for rural electrification — Part 7-1: Generators — Photovoltaic arrays

IEC TS 62257-9-5 — Recommendations for small renewable energy and hybrid systems for rural electrification — Part 9-5: Integrated system — Selection and design, installation and maintenance of rural electrification systems — Particular specifications for SHS
ABER — Agence Burkinabè de l'Electrification Rurale (rural electrification authority — off-grid and mini-grid programme specifications)
ARSE — Autorité de Régulation du Secteur de l'Énergie (licensing authority for mini-grid operators)

summary.en: China does not have a directly equivalent rural electrification standards framework referencing IEC TS 62257. Chinese off-grid PV system standards include GB/T 19064 (Solar home system — Technical requirements and test methods) and relevant NB/T standards for stand-alone PV systems. These Chinese off-grid standards are based on China's domestic conditions and are not recognised by ABER, ARSE, or donor/lender procurement specifications in Burkina Faso as equivalent to IEC TS 62257 series evidence.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接对应的引用IEC TS 62257的农村电气化标准框架。中国离网光伏系统标准包括GB/T 19064（太阳能家用系统——技术要求和测试方法）及相关独立光伏系统NB/T标准。上述中国离网标准基于中国国内条件，不被布基纳法索ABER、ARSE或捐助方/贷款方采购规格认可为IEC TS 62257系列证据的等效依据。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接對應的引用IEC TS 62257的農村電氣化標準框架。中國離網光伏系統標準包括GB/T 19064（太陽能家用系統——技術要求和測試方法）及相關獨立光伏系統NB/T標準。上述中國離網標準基於中國國內條件，不被布吉納法索ABER、ARSE或捐助方/貸款方採購規格認可為IEC TS 62257系列證據的等效依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19064-2003 — 家用太阳能光伏电源系统技术条件和试验方法 (Solar home system — Technical requirements and test methods)
NB/T 32012-2013 — 光伏发电站太阳能资源实时监测技术要求 (relevant NB/T off-grid PV standards)

gap.en: Gap: For off-grid and mini-grid PV inverters in Burkina Faso, Chinese domestic off-grid standards (GB/T 19064, relevant NB/T standards) are not accepted by ABER, ARSE, or donor/lender procurement programmes as equivalent to IEC TS 62257 series compliance. Exporters must: (a) confirm applicable IEC TS 62257 part(s) with the project owner or ABER/FDE programme manager; (b) provide IEC TS 62257-compliant technical documentation and test evidence; (c) confirm ARSE licensing requirements for the mini-grid operator; (d) verify project-specific donor/lender procurement standards before equipment selection. Note that Chinese inverter manufacturers supplying Sahel markets commonly adapt products for high-temperature operation; however, adaptation alone does not substitute for IEC TS 62257 type-test documentation.
gap.zh: 差距：对于布基纳法索离网及微电网光伏逆变器，中国国内离网标准（GB/T 19064、相关NB/T标准）不被ABER、ARSE或捐助方/贷款方采购项目接受为IEC TS 62257系列合规的等效依据。出口商须：（a）向项目业主或ABER/FDE计划管理方确认适用的IEC TS 62257部分；（b）提供符合IEC TS 62257的技术文件和测试证据；（c）确认微电网运营商的ARSE许可要求；（d）在设备选型前核实项目特定的捐助方/贷款方采购标准。请注意，供应萨赫勒市场的中国逆变器制造商通常会针对高温运行调整产品；但仅凭调整不能替代IEC TS 62257型式试验文件。
gap.zht: 差距：對於布吉納法索離網及微電網光伏逆變器，中國國內離網標準（GB/T 19064、相關NB/T標準）不被ABER、ARSE或捐助方/貸款方採購項目接受為IEC TS 62257系列合規的等效依據。出口商須：（a）向項目業主或ABER/FDE計畫管理方確認適用的IEC TS 62257部分；（b）提供符合IEC TS 62257的技術文件和測試證據；（c）確認微電網運營商的ARSE許可要求；（d）在設備選型前核實項目特定的捐助方/貸款方採購標準。請注意，供應薩赫勒市場的中國逆變器製造商通常會針對高溫運行調整產品；但僅憑調整不能替代IEC TS 62257型式試驗文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for donor/lender-financed off-grid and mini-grid projects where IEC TS 62257 is specified; ARSE licensing mandatory for mini-grid operators; ABER programme specifications apply to rural electrification tender lots
mandatory_status.cn: No direct Chinese mandatory equivalent for IEC TS 62257 off-grid/mini-grid specifications; GB/T 19064 is a voluntary recommended standard for solar home systems under Chinese law

source.publisher: ABER — Agence Burkinabè de l'Electrification Rurale (Burkina Faso)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Off-grid and mini-grid PV inverters for Burkina Faso projects must meet IEC TS 62257 series requirements as specified by ABER programme managers and donor/lender procurement rules — Chinese domestic off-grid standards are not accepted as equivalent. Confirm the applicable IEC TS 62257 parts and donor/lender procurement requirements with the project owner before equipment selection. ARSE licensing requirements for mini-grid operators must be verified directly with ARSE before project commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 布基纳法索项目的离网及微电网光伏逆变器须满足ABER计划管理方和捐助方/贷款方采购规则规定的IEC TS 62257系列要求——中国国内离网标准不被接受为等效依据。在设备选型前，请向项目业主确认适用的IEC TS 62257部分及捐助方/贷款方采购要求。微电网运营商的ARSE许可要求须在项目调试前直接向ARSE核实。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 布吉納法索項目的離網及微電網光伏逆變器須滿足ABER計畫管理方和捐助方/貸款方採購規則規定的IEC TS 62257系列要求——中國國內離網標準不被接受為等效依據。在設備選型前，請向項目業主確認適用的IEC TS 62257部分及捐助方/貸款方採購要求。微電網運營商的ARSE許可要求須在項目調試前直接向ARSE核實。
